narrative:
Riverlea-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 493 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.7 percentage points.
